name: com.polyphase.build.target.dreamcast
author: Justin Jaro
description: Adds a 'Dreamcast (KallistiOS)' build target to the Polyphase editor. Routes the compile/package/run pipeline through a user-selectable toolchain: DreamSDK (Windows, via dreamsdk-runner.exe), a native KallistiOS install ($KOS_BASE + environ.sh), or KallistiOS inside WSL. Compiles the engine + Runtime/Dreamcast into a KOS .elf, wraps it into a .cdi/.gdi with mkdcdisc, and launches in flycast/lxdream/redream or deploys to hardware via dc-tool-ip. Ships a Variant-2 engine runtime (Runtime/Dreamcast) plus Makefile_Dreamcast.
